description: Katala P2 mediation fields based on six source components: three from quantum theory and three from relativity.

core_view.summary: P2 is the IUT bridge layer. It mediates six source components before unified L3 computation.

field_groups.meaning: Quantum-side notion of time, evolution parameter, or temporal ordering.
field_groups.p2_role: mediate quantum temporal evolution against relativity time structure
mediate quantum spatial/configuration structure against spacetime geometry

field_groups.meaning: Quantum-side notion of state-space dimension, degrees of freedom, or representation dimension.
field_groups.p2_role: mediate quantum dimensional structure into unified higher-layer dimension handling

field_groups.meaning: Relativity-side notion of time as part of spacetime, not isolated scalar time alone.
field_groups.p2_role: provide spacetime-temporal anchor for unified mediation

field_groups.meaning: Relativity-side notion of space/position embedded in spacetime geometry.
field_groups.p2_role: provide spacetime-spatial anchor for unified mediation

field_groups.meaning: Relativity-side notion of spacetime dimension, including higher-dimensional extension candidates.
field_groups.p2_role: provide dimension carrier for unified high-layer model; current estimate may require at least 8D by relativity counting

p2_success_criteria.best_case: direct unified Euclidean reduction at L3 computation stage
p2_success_criteria.fallback_case: local or limit Euclidean recovery at L3
